example_sentence: No cabe duda de que la situación requiere atención urgente.
example_translation: There is no doubt that the situation requires urgent attention.

word: hay que tener en cuenta que
translation: one must take into account that
pronunciation_hint: AHI keh teh-NEHR en KWEHN-tah keh
example_sentence: Hay que tener en cuenta que no todos tienen las mismas oportunidades.
example_translation: One must take into account that not everyone has the same opportunities.

translation: while it is true that / although it is true that
example_sentence: Si bien es cierto que hay problemas, también hay avances.
example_translation: While it is true that there are problems, there is also progress.

example_sentence: No se trata de un fracaso; por el contrario, es un punto de partida.
example_translation: It's not a failure; on the contrary, it's a starting point.

example_sentence: ¿Acaso no es obligación del Estado garantizar la educación?
example_translation: Isn't it the State's obligation to guarantee education?

translation: up to a point / to a certain extent
example_sentence: Hasta cierto punto, entiendo su argumento.
example_translation: Up to a point, I understand their argument.

translation: it should be noted that / it is worth noting that
example_sentence: Cabe señalar que los datos provienen de fuentes verificadas.
example_translation: It should be noted that the data comes from verified sources.

translation: for all the above reasons / in light of all the above
example_sentence: Por todo lo anterior, considero que la propuesta debe aprobarse.
example_translation: For all the above reasons, I believe the proposal should be approved.

example_sentence: Lejos de resolver el problema, la medida lo empeoró.
example_translation: Far from solving the problem, the measure made it worse.

translation: one could say that / it could be said that
example_sentence: Podría decirse que ambas posiciones tienen mérito.
example_translation: One could say that both positions have merit.

translation: to look good / to save face / to be well-regarded
example_sentence: En México, quedar bien con los demás es muy importante.
example_translation: In Mexico, maintaining a good image with others is very important.

translation: you only need to look at the fact that
example_sentence: Basta con ver que las cifras han aumentado tres años consecutivos.
example_translation: You only need to look at the fact that the figures have risen three consecutive years.
